AvailableNumber.title: AvailableNumber
AvailableNumber.description: Represents a single sequential document number available for generation.

fullNumber.description: The formatted document number with placeholders (e.g., {DOCTYPE} 13919/HK.800/TA-760103/12-2025).

isUsed.description: Whether the number has been assigned to a user.

assignedTo.description: The email of the user who generated this number.

UserGenerationLimit.title: UserGenerationLimit
UserGenerationLimit.description: Tracks the daily generation count for individual users to enforce quotas.

lastGeneratedDate.description: Date of the last generation in YYYY-MM-DD format.

/availableNumbers/{numberId}.description: Collection of unique sequential numbers available for users to claim.
